text: Hot Food.
We sit down to eat,
and the potato is a bit hot,
so I only put a little bit on my fork
and I blow till it's cool, just cool, then into the mouth.
(Eating Sound)
Nice.
And there's my brother. He's doing the same.
Till it's cool, just cool, into the mouth.
Nice.
There is my mom. She is doing the same.
Till it's cool, just cool, into the mouth.
Nice.
But my dad, my dad...
What does he do?
He stuffs a great big chunk of potato into his mouth,
and then that really does it.
His eyes pop out.
He flaps his hands, he blows, he puffs, he yells, he bobs his head up and down.
He spits bits of potato all over his plate,
and he turns to us and he goes,
" Watch out, everybody!"
"The potato is really hot!"
